creator: hpaluch@seznam.cz
text:
(In reply to Jan Beich from comment #1)

I have no problem, when _ports_ are build with native CPU optimizations.

However _official binary packages_ should be build with generic x86_64 optimization - to behave some way as official FreeBSD distribution that also supports all generic x86_64 CPUs.

I suggest to ensure that make.conf on package build server is set in such way that official packages (not ports) are usable on generic x86_64 CPUs.
